parents.subject: LU-8703 libcfs: rework CPU pattern parsing code

commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: run POSIX test suite
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: run POSIX test suite

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=posix

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=posix

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=posix

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=posix

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testlist=posix

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testlist=posix
